subcodes.first_line: Blessed are the souls who have taken a shelter under the shade of the Tree of Purity! Happy is the condition
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی از برای نفوسیکه در ظل سدره طوبی ماوی گرفته اند و نیکوست حال عبادیکه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @law of fasting
